results.title: Experts urge longer EU funding horizons to boost food and nutrition innovation
results.description: A Finnish longitudinal study has found that public research, development, and innovation (RDI) subsidies have a significant impact on companies’ innovations. It underscores that the results are seen in the long term. Nutrition Insight speaks to the study lead from the University of Oulu to discuss how the findings are relevant for food and nutrition innovation, especially since governments in Europe find it challenging to justify long-term public funding due to expectations of fast results.

results.title: HIV cases rising in Sri Lanka; Colombo, Gampaha record highest numbers
results.description: HIV infections are on the rise in Sri Lanka, with Colombo and Gampaha reporting the highest number of cases, Consultant Community Physician Dr. Sathya Herath said.

results.title: Odisha man dies after alleged mobile phone assault during domestic dispute
results.description: A man in Odisha’s Bolangir district died after he was allegedly hit on the head with a mobile phone during a domestic dispute with his wife. Police have launched an investigation and are waiting for the post mortem report to determine the exact cause of death before taking further legal action.

results.title: Bomb Threat Sparks Panic at Baleshwar Court
results.description: Tension gripped Baleshwar court premises today after a bomb threat email, written in Tamil, was received at the office of the District and Sessions Judge around 2:05 PM. The message warned of an explosion, sparking immediate panic among lawyers, staff, and visitors. Court proceedings were halted as people rushed out of the premises. results.title: India's exports rise 15.5% in June, trade deficit widens to $30.43 bn
results.description: During April-June this fiscal, exports increased 15.92 per cent to $129.32 billion, while imports rose 19.89 per cent to USD 216.18 billion.

results.title: Bomb Threat Received by Greater Noida DM Office Sparks Major Security Operation
results.description: A bomb threat received via email at the Greater Noida District Magistrate office has led to a significant security operation. Local police swiftly initiated a thorough search of the premises, ensuring the safety of officials and visitors. So far, no suspicious items have been discovered, and authorities are investigating the email's origin. This incident follows a previous case where a mentally ill individual was arrested for sending false bomb threats. The police remain vigilant as they continue to monitor the situation and enhance security measures around the DM office.
